hero.subtitle: Loyalty campaigns that excite and engage customers of all targets. Deliver real impact to your stores with measurable KPIs. Easy to run for retailers and their marketing teams.

international.title: We are truly international
international.subtitle: Based in Italy and Slovenia, we operate in 20+ European countries and keep growing. Our international network of local experts ensures campaigns are culturally relevant and operationally flawless.

clients.title: The Leading Retailers Who Already Trusted Us

brandPartners.title: Global Brands That Power Our Campaigns

closing.title: Ready to Design Your Next Loyalty Experience?
closing.subtitle: Let's talk about how we can help your customers come back more often, spend more, and feel great about it.

hero.title: We Are Central to Loyalty.
hero.subtitle: KLR was born from friendship — different cultures, shared ambitions, and a belief that loyalty is built on trust. Over ten years, we've grown from a three-person office in Koper to a 43-person international team delivering campaigns across 20+ European markets.

whatWeDo.mainText: We transform customer engagement in grocery and petrol retail into lasting loyalty — combining behavioural insight, emotional reward design, and measurable commercial outcomes. Easy to run for retailers and their marketing teams.
whatWeDo.badge2: Not just a rewards supplier. A strategic loyalty partner.
whatWeDo.badge3: We make loyalty campaigns easy to run.

brandStory.title: Where Others Operate Loyalty Programs, We Design Emotional Loyalty Experiences
brandStory.text: KLR was founded in 2015 in Koper, Slovenia — a city at the crossroads of Central and Western Europe. From day one, our ambition was clear: bring world-class loyalty marketing to retailers who needed it most. Today, we are a 43-person team spanning 11 nationalities, running campaigns in 20+ markets.

moreThanLoyalty.title: We Are More Than a Loyalty Company

vision.title: We Are Central to Loyalty
vision.item1: We envision a future where loyalty campaigns are the most effective tool for retailers to build lasting customer relationships.
vision.item2: Where retailers can run engaging loyalty programs effortlessly, powered by world-class licensed products and seamless execution.
vision.item3: KLR aims to become the most trusted loyalty partner for grocery and petrol retail in Europe.

corePromise.title: We Make the Process More Than Simple.
corePromise.text: From concept to in-store execution, logistics, brand licensing, and post-campaign reporting — we manage 100% of the campaign so your team stays focused on running your business.

closing.title: Let's Build Something Together
closing.subtitle: Whether you're a retailer looking for your next campaign or a brand wanting to reach millions — we'd love to hear from you.

hero.title: 360° Loyalty Campaign Design & Execution
hero.subtitle: From the first strategic brief to the last reward delivered — we cover every stage, in every market.

overview.title: Three Pillars. One Seamless Experience.
overview.bodyText: We design and execute loyalty campaigns that increase store visits, grow average ticket, turn occasional shoppers into loyal customers, build emotional brand connection, and make your banner stand out with buzz, reputation, virality, and market share.
overview.tagline: Emotionally engaging for customers and simple to run for retailers.

nextChallenge.intro: But we are ready to take the next challenge:
nextChallenge.closing: Overall, we are loyalty Makers for any retailer.

closing.title: Every Campaign Is Different. Let's Find the Right Approach for Yours.
closing.subtitle: Whether you're launching your first loyalty programme or optimising an existing one — we'd love to hear from you.

pillar1.title: Loyalty Marketing Strategy
pillar1.what: We develop loyalty strategies rooted in behavioural insight and local market understanding, tailored to your goals, competitive landscape, and customers' real motivations.
pillar1.how: Market analysis, customer segmentation, campaign concept design, mechanics selection (collectibles, instant rewards, tiered programmes), reward strategy.
pillar1.out: A fully developed campaign concept with defined mechanics, reward selection, visual direction, and projected KPIs.

pillar2.title: Full Campaign Management
pillar2.what: End-to-end execution across multiple markets. Creative production, POSM, logistics, stock management, staff training, daily support.
pillar2.how: Our network across 10 European locations handles procurement, warehousing, distribution. Proprietary software with weekly performance monitoring.
pillar2.out: Stress-free rollout with dedicated project management, real-time reporting, single point of contact.

pillar3.title: Measurement & Analytics
pillar3.what: Data-driven campaign evaluation. Period sales uplift, ROI, brand equity, CRR, RPR, redemption patterns, basket size impact.
pillar3.how: Quantitative data + qualitative insights from discovery workshops and social media audits. Custom metrics.
pillar3.out: Actionable reports with optimisation recommendations. Compounding knowledge base.

hero.title: Keep in Touch!
hero.subtitle: Whether you're ready to launch a campaign, exploring ideas, looking for a brand partnership, or simply curious — we'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Let's Start Something New Together
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your campaign, idea, or question…

nextSteps.title: Simple steps, real results
nextSteps.step1Desc: Our team reads every inquiry carefully and responds within one business day.
nextSteps.step2Desc: If there's a fit, we schedule a short call to understand your goals and context.
nextSteps.step3Desc: From there, we propose an approach designed specifically for your campaign and market.

hero.title: A Decade of Trust and Teamwork

intro.eyebrow: 10 years of commitment, teamwork and growth
intro.title: More than a company —
intro.emphasis: a story of people growing together.
intro.subtitle: KLR was born from friendship — different cultures, shared ambitions, and a belief that loyalty is built on trust.
intro.paragraph1: Over the past 10 years, we've grown not just as a business, but as individuals, adapting, learning, and pushing boundaries together.
intro.paragraph2: Our success isn't just measured in numbers but in the strong partnerships we've built across Europe, the milestones we've reached, and the people who've shaped our journey.

anniversary.title: 10 Years of Loyalty, Trust and Teamwork
anniversary.subtitle: From a single office in Koper in 2015 to 43 professionals across 20+ European markets.

journey.title: 10 Years of Growth
journey.milestonesText:
2015|First office opening in Koper, Slovenia
2015|First petrol station campaign — Richardson Sheffield at Adria Oil, Croatia
2016|First supermarket campaign — Bormioli Rocco at Tuš, Bosnia
2017|Rovato office opening in Italy
2017|First 10 countries milestone reached
2017|First multi-country campaign — Blaupunkt for MOL Group, 6 markets
2019|First lottery & international retail chain campaign — Ducati Corse at Kaufland, Bulgaria
2025|Celebrating 10 years in 20 countries

map.title: 10 years of growth on a map.
map.subtitle: Based in Italy and Slovenia, we operate in 20+ countries in Europe and keep growing. Having an international network of partners helps us to better serve our multinational clients by providing local expertise and understanding of different cultures and consumer behaviours.

vision.title: The people who shaped the decade.
vision.point1: KLR was born from friendship — people from different cultures coming together. Our journey is about more than knowledge; it's about growth, adaptability, and teamwork.
vision.point2: Success isn't about hiring experience; it's about hiring those eager to learn. Technical skills can be taught, but a growth mindset is invaluable.
vision.point3: Loyalty in B2B is about trust, not just transactions. We build lasting partnerships that create value beyond purchases.

team.title: The People Who Made It Happen

closing.title: Ready for the Next 10?
closing.subtitle: The best campaigns are still ahead.

hero.subtitle: At KLR Europe, we believe privacy is important. We want you to be aware of the data we collect, how we use it, and with whom we share it.

company.title:
Privacy is
important to us.
company.paragraph1: At KLR-EVROPA D.O.O. ("KLR Europe"), we believe privacy is important. We want you to be aware about the data that we track and collect, how we use these data and with whom we share them. This privacy policy applies to all personal data we collect in connection with our corporate website, www.klr-europe.com.
company.paragraph2: The purpose of this page is to inform the natural person (the "Data Subject") about the processing of personal data collected by KLR-EVROPA D.O.O. (the "Data Controller") via the website https://klr-europe.com/ (the "Application").

cookies.intro: The Application uses cookies, web beacons, univocal identifiers and other similar technologies to collect Personal Data on visited pages and links. This data is stored and then used the next time the Data Subject browses the Application.
cookies.typesText:
First Party|Set by the website you're visiting. Only that specific website can read them.
Third Party|Set by websites other than the one you're visiting. Mainly used for tracking and marketing.
Persistent|Stored on your computer even after you quit your browser.
Session|Automatically deleted from your computer immediately after you quit your browser.
cookies.manage: You can refuse or accept performance and marketing cookies through our cookie banner or browser settings at any time. For more info: aboutcookies.org

legalBasis.intro: Personal Data may be processed under several legal bases depending on the purpose of the processing.
legalBasis.itemsText:
Contract Performance|Fulfillment of any obligation arising from the pre-contractual or contractual relationship.
Legal Obligations|Fulfilment of any obligation provided for by the applicable norms, laws and regulations, in particular on tax and fiscal matters.
Legitimate Interest|Marketing purposes by e-mail for products/services similar to those sold.
Consent|Profiling for marketing purposes via automated processing to predict the Data Subject's preferences.

storage.itemsText:
Contract|Entire duration of the contractual relationship + 10 years ordinary prescription period.
Legal Disputes|Entire duration of disputes, until the time limit for appeals has expired.
Legal Obligations|Relevant timeframes provided by applicable obligations, regulations, and laws.
Consent-based|Until the consent is revoked by the Data Subject.

rights.itemsText:
Be informed about the processing of their Personal Data
Withdraw consent at any time
Restrict the processing of Personal Data
Object to the processing of Personal Data
Access their Personal Data
Verify and request the rectification of Personal Data
Obtain the erasure of Personal Data
Transfer Personal Data to another data controller
File a complaint with the Personal Data protection supervisory authority
Take legal action

applicability.title:
Copyright &
General
Conditions
applicability.paragraph1: These conditions apply to all persons who visit the website of KLR Europe (KLR-EVROPA D.O.O.) and to all information and services that can be consulted on or via this Website.
applicability.paragraph2: Please read these conditions carefully. When accessing and using this Website you agree to be bound to these conditions and all applicable laws and regulations within the jurisdiction from which you are accessing this Website. Please do not access or use this site if you do not agree to these conditions. We may change these conditions at any time. This will take immediate effect.
